sections.paragraph: Deu 3:17 כִּנְּרֹות 1Ki 15:20 כִּנֲּרֹות Jos 11:2 (prob. i.q. כִּנֹּור “a harp”), [Chinneroth, Cinneroth, Cinnereth], pr.n. of a town in the tribe of Naphtali, by the sea of Galilee, which hence received the name יָם כִּנֶּרֶת Num 34:11. In the times of the New Test. this sea [or lake] was called גּנֵסַר Γεννησαρέτ.
